title: Spicy Sausage and Fold Vegetarian Wrap
description: A juicy date-night polish dish featuring a blend of crispy sausage and fresh fold vegetables in a warm wrap, perfect for those who enjoy a bit of heat and spice.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat. Add Fold Vegetables and sauté for about 5 minutes until tender.
In a separate pan, gently cook the Sausage Patties until they are browned on all sides but still juicy inside.
Place Fold Vegetables onto the tortilla wrap with a pat of the cooked Sausage Pattie in the center. Add optional toppings like Salsa Verde and Pico de Gallo if desired.
Fold the wrap over to seal, creating an elegant date-night style wrap.
